differences: The shared bottom-tab pantry icon has a slightly different glyph shape from the fixed prototype.
Production recipebook metadata is limited to the existing tag array because the API contract does not expose dedicated view count, minutes, or servings fields.
suggestions: Keep shared bottom-tab icon reshaping in a shared navigation follow-up.
Only add dedicated recipe metric fields after an official contract update exposes them.
reasoning: The mobile RECIPEBOOK_DETAIL and delete confirmation sheet match the fixed references in layout, spacing, card density, typography, destructive action hierarchy, and bottom-sheet placement. Remaining differences are classified contract/shared-navigation follow-ups, so unclassified visual differences are 0.
